name: Proud Real Estate Public Company Limited
summary: Proud Real Estate Public Company Limited engages in the construction and real estate development businesses in Thailand. The company develops residential condominiums. It also acts as the construction contractor. The company was formerly known as Focus Development and Construction Public Company Limited and changed its name to Proud Real Estate Public Company Limited in May 2019. Proud Real Estate Public Company Limited was founded in 1989 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
